caption: A woman with short brown hair and glasses sits at a white desk in a craft room, wearing a gray cardigan over a white floral print blouse. She holds a small light-blue piece of paper in both hands, looking down at it as she speaks. In the background, shelves hold various craft supplies, including colorful markers and a sign that reads "MERRY CHRISTMAS". A heat gun and a pair of scissors are visible on a stand behind her, and a tablet rests on the desk to her left. As the sequence progresses, she glances down at the paper, then looks up toward the camera with a smile, and finally looks back down at the paper again. Her hands move slightly while holding the slip of paper, but her position and the surrounding equipment remain stationary.
